caption: A large assembly hall is filled with people seated in tiered, wooden desks, many of whom are wearing white clothing and orange headscarves. Small screens are integrated into the desks in front of the attendees. The setting is an expansive indoor chamber with textured wall panels and aisles of light-colored flooring. Throughout the sequence, the attendees remain mostly seated, though some shift their positions or turn toward one another. In the foreground, several individuals wearing bright orange turbans and scarves are visible. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, providing a wider view of the vast crowd and the structured layout of the seating. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the frames. The overall scene depicts a formal gathering of a large group of people in a structured, academic or governmental environment.
